name: deep-skills
description: The Deep-* series: deep-plan → deep-plan-review → deep-implement → deep-code-review (→ deep-bugfix → re-review) → deep-docs. A steerable, fresh-agent-resumable workflow for planning, reviewing, building, code-reviewing, and bug-fixing features, then mapping what's built — with a self-improving directive loop that learns from each review.

interface.shortDescription: Plan → review → build → code-review → bugfix → docs, as one resumable workflow.
